name: subscription-billing-recurring-billing-engine
description: T211 RecurringBillingEngine — BILLING archetype. MANDATORY order: status(1)→lock(2)→invoice(3)→charge(4)→audit(5)→emit(6). DPO conflict: inverts FLOW-09-T107 seat-before-payment. dunning from FREEDOM config.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: MANDATORY 6-step order (status→lock→invoice→charge→audit→emit), dunning from FREEDOM config, DPO conflict with FLOW-09-T107, no step reordering
Retrieve BILLING arch pattern + billing-step-order + dunning-from-config + billing-lock-guard + audit-before-emit patterns for T211

Break T211 into: 1-check subscription status → 2-acquire billing lock → 3-generate invoice → 4-charge payment method → 5-storeDocument(billingAudit) → 6-emit BillingCycleCompleted. dunningConfig from FREEDOM. Steps IMMUTABLE in order.

Generate recurring-billing-engine.service.ts — triggered by BillingCycleDue delayed queue job. MANDATORY step order: (1) check subscription status=ACTIVE, (2) acquire billing lock, (3) generate invoice, (4) charge via payment fabric, (5) storeDocument(billingAudit) DNA-8, (6) emit BillingCycleCompleted. dunningMaxAttempts and dunningIntervalDays read from FREEDOM config NEVER hardcoded. DPO contrast: inverts T107 which charges before seating.
Named check validation: status_check_step1, lock_acquired_step2, invoice_step3, charge_step4, audit_store_step5, emit_step6, dunning_from_freedom_config, no_step_reorder
Score generated code 0-100 against T211 iron rules: mandatory step order, dunning from FREEDOM config, lock guard, DNA-8 at step 5
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=mandatory-6-step-order+dunning-from-freedom+lock-before-invoice, rejected=reordered-steps OR hardcoded-dunning-config OR charge-before-lock OR emit-before-audit. curriculumTier=2.

entry: Triggered by BillingCycleDue delayed queue job
